title: SCREENWISE-ENROLLING - 211info
text: OUTSIDE IN EAST BURNSIDE SCREENWISE-ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breast and cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 16144 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: -Age 18-39 and needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services -Must live or intend to live in Oregon -Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Men of any age with symptoms of breast cancer are eligible for breast and genetic services. United States citizenship is not required to participate in the ScreenWise program. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-5pm. Friday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-4:30pm. The 2nd Tuesday of every month is closed until 10am. Email (503) 535-3860 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 535-3860 ScreenWise (971) 673-0581 FAX (503) 535-3868 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-5pm. Friday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-4:30pm. The 2nd Tuesday of every month is closed until 11am. Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL CLINIC SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TRANS CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUTSIDE IN EAST BURNSIDE
